title: cataria vulgaris
intro: Cataria vulgaris, also known as wild chamomile, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of cataria vulgaris include soothing digestive issues, reducing anxiety and stress, and promoting relaxation due to its calming properties. Cataria vulgaris can be consumed as a herbal tea, used as a topical cream, or ingested as a supplement to harness its medicinal properties.
